task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Rocket.Chat instance using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or administration panel is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Administration workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Administration panel or Settings menu is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the API or Rate Limiter settings section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings page with 'API', 'REST API', or 'Rate Limiter' in the header or active sidebar menu is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Enable Rate Limiter' setting is turned on.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle switch or checkbox labeled 'Enable Rate Limiter' (or similar) is in the 'true', 'on', or checked state.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Default Number of Requests' is set to exactly 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field labeled 'Default Number of Requests' (or similar) contains the exact numeric value '20'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the modified settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save changes' button is clicked, or a success notification (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface rather than terminal commands to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web UI being interacted with in a web browser, not a terminal window executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings changes are visible within the actual Rocket.Chat Administration UI, not typed into a text editor or notes application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state of the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the UI looks like a standard Rocket.Chat interface without manipulated DOM elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target settings to modify are 'API_Enable_Rate_Limiter' (must be enabled) and 'API_Default_Count' (must be set to exactly 20). The agent must log in using the username 'admin'.
